# Echolane Recording Studio

> High-End recording, mixing and mastering studio in Bergen/Hohne, Lower Saxony, Germany — operated by Kai Schwerdtfeger.

## Summary

Echolane Recording Studio is a professional audio production facility specializing in recording, mixing and mastering for rock, metal, blues and alternative music. The studio features a Harrison master recording console, Pro Tools HD, premium microphones and analog outboard gear.

Languages: German (primary), English (contact page available).

## Services

- Recording (bands, orchestras, vocals, voice-over)
- Mixing (analog and digital hybrid workflow)
- Mastering (in-studio and online mastering service)
- Live recording sessions

## Key people

- Kai Schwerdtfeger — Recording, Mixing & Mastering Engineer

## Location

- Echolane Recording Studio
- Blücherstraße 1, 29303 Bergen/Hohne, Germany
- Phone: +49 (0)5051 914046
- Mobile: +49 (0)176 32647786
- Email: info@echolane.de
- Website: https://www.echolane.de

## Keywords (DE)

## Keywords (EN)

recording studio Germany, mixing mastering studio, professional recording studio, rock metal recording, Harrison console, audio engineering, online mastering, Lower Saxony
